channel.title: Tampa Bay News Monitor
channel.description: Press releases and breaking news, Tampa Bay

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Church pastor describes gunshots after 2 Hillsborough County deputies were shot
item.description: A pastor at a church in Ruskin described hearing the gunfire after the Hillsborough County Sheriff's Office said a suspect shot two deputies on Thursday.

item.title: [WATCHLIST: city council] [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Duke Energy's future looking bright in Clearwater following unanimous City Council vote
item.description: After a unanimous vote in favor of Duke Energy's new 30-year agreement with the City of Clearwater, the deal now heads for a second reading despite public pushback Thursday evening.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] President Donald Trump claims new documents show widespread vulnerabilities in US election security
item.description: On Thursday, President Trump said he would declassify documents that showed a history of security threats and foreign influence aimed at U.S. elections. Scripps News is reviewing the documents.

item.title: [WATCHLIST: city council] [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Clearwater Duke Energy deal: City council clears first vote on 30-year contract
item.description: Clearwater city leaders voted unanimously Thursday to advance a 30-year franchise contract with Duke Energy, choosing corporate power over a proposed public alternative.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Polk County Fire Rescue to approve new Delta shift schedule to reduce hours, overtime
item.description: Polk County Fire Rescue and its union reached a tentative agreement Tuesday to launch a new scheduling shift designed to improve work-life balance for local firefighters.

item.title: [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] First Alert: Tropical System to Bring Heavy Rain, Gusty Winds Through Monday
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Florida Lottery Fantasy 5, Cash Pop results for July 16, 2026
